import java.util.HashMap; import java.util.HashSet; public class Solution { public int findPairs(int[] nums, int k) { if (k < 0) return 0; // Use a stream to process the array return Arrays.stream(nums) .distinct() // Remove duplicates for accurate counting .filter(num -> occurrences.containsKey(num + k)) .count(); } }

import java.util.HashMap; import java.util.HashSet; public class Solution { public int findPairs(int[] nums, int k) { if (k < 0) return 0; HashSet starters = new HashSet<>(); HashMap occurrences = new HashMap<>(); // Stream pipeline to process the array Arrays.stream(nums) .forEach(num -> { if (occurrences.containsKey(num + k)) starters.add(num); if (occurrences.containsKey(num - k)) starters.add(num - k); occurrences.put(num, occurrences.getOrDefault(num, 0) + 1); }); return starters.size(); } }

import java.util.HashMap; import java.util.HashSet; public class Solution { public int findPairs(int[] nums, int k) { if (k < 0) return 0; // Create a stream from the array return Arrays.stream(nums) .distinct() // Remove duplicates to ensure unique pairs .filter(num -> occurrences.containsKey(num + k)) .count(); // Count how many valid pairs exist // HashMap to store occurrences of each number HashMap occurrences = new HashMap<>(); for (int num : nums) { occurrences.put(num, occurrences.getOrDefault(num, 0) + 1); } } } This refactored code uses a Java Stream pipeline to replace the original loop. The `distinct()` method is used to remove any duplicate numbers before filtering and counting pairs.

public class Solution { public double findMaxAverage(int[] nums, int k) { long total = 0; for(int i = 0; i < k; i++) { total += nums[i]; } double max_avg = (double) total / k; for(int i = k; i < nums.length; i++) { total += nums[i] - nums[i - k]; max_avg = Math.max(max_avg, (double) total / k); } return max_avg; } }

public class Solution { public int maximumSwap(int num) { char[] num_str = Integer.toString(num).toCharArray(); for (int i = 0; i < num_str.length - 1; i++) { int max_digit_index = i; // Find the largest digit to swap with for (int j = i + 1; j < num_str.length; j++) { if ((num_str[j] > num_str[max_digit_index]) || (num_str[j] == num_str[max_digit_index] && last[num_str[j] - '0'] > max_digit_index)) { max_digit_index = j; } } // If a larger digit is found, swap it with the current position if (max_digit_index != i) { char temp = num_str[i]; num_str[i] = num_str[max_digit_index]; num_str[max_digit_index] = temp; return Integer.parseInt(new String(num_str)); } } return num; } private void swap(char[] arr, int i, int j) { char temp = arr[i]; arr[i] = arr[j]; arr[j] = temp; } }

public class Solution { public int maximumSwap(int num) { char[] num_str = Integer.toString(num).toCharArray(); int max_digit_index = -1; for (int i = 0; i < num_str.length; i++) { if (num_str[i] > num_str[max_digit_index]) { max_digit_index = i; } else if (num_str[i] < num_str[max_digit_index]) { swap(num_str, i, max_digit_index); return Integer.parseInt(new String(num_str)); } } return num; } private void swap(char[] arr, int i, int j) { char temp = arr[i]; arr[i] = arr[j]; arr[j] = temp; } }

public class Solution { public int maximumSwap(int num) { char[] num_str = Integer.toString(num).toCharArray(); int[] last = new int[10]; for (int i = 0; i < num_str.length; i++) { last[num_str[i] - '0'] = i; } for (int d = 9; d >= 0; d--) { if (last[d] > 0) { swap(num_str, 0, last[d]); return Integer.parseInt(new String(num_str)); } } return num; } private void swap(char[] arr, int i, int j) { char temp = arr[i]; arr[i] = arr[j]; arr[j] = temp; } }

public class Solution { public int maxDistToClosest(int[] seats) { if (seats == null || seats.length == 0) throw new IllegalArgumentException("Invalid input"); int n = seats.length; int maxDist = 0, lastPerson = -1; for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) { if (seats[i] != 1) continue; if (lastPerson == -1) maxDist = i; else maxDist = Math.max(maxDist, (i - lastPerson) / 2); lastPerson = i; } return maxDist; } }

public class Solution { public int maxDistToClosest(int[] seats) { if (seats == null || seats.length == 0) throw new IllegalArgumentException("Invalid input"); int n = seats.length; int maxDist = 0, lastPerson = -1; for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) { if (seats[i] != 1 && lastPerson == -1) continue; if (lastPerson == -1 || (i - lastPerson) / 2 > maxDist) maxDist = (i - lastPerson) / 2; lastPerson = i; } return Math.max(maxDist, n - 1 - lastPerson); } }

public class Solution { public int maxDistToClosest(int[] seats) { if (seats == null || seats.length == 0) throw new IllegalArgumentException("Invalid input"); int n = seats.length; int maxDist = 0, lastPerson = -1; for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) { if (seats[i] != 1 && (lastPerson == -1 || i - lastPerson > 2)) { return Math.max(maxDist, (i - lastPerson + 1) / 2); } } maxDist = Math.max(n - 1 - lastPerson, n); if (seats[0] != 1 && seats[n - 1] != 1) throw new IllegalArgumentException("Invalid input"); return maxDist; } }

public class Solution { public int maxDistToClosest(int[] seats) { if (seats == null || seats.length == 0) throw new IllegalArgumentException("Invalid input"); int n = seats.length; int maxDist = 0, lastPerson = -1; for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) { if (seats[i] != 1) continue; if (lastPerson == -1) maxDist = i; else maxDist = Math.max(maxDist, (i - lastPerson) / 2); lastPerson = i; } return maxDist; } }

import java.util.HashMap; import java.util.Map; public class Solution { public int numSquarefulPerms(int[] nums) { Map counter = new HashMap<>(); for (int num : nums) counter.put(num, counter.getOrDefault(num, 0) + 1); return dfs(nums, 0, counter); } private boolean isSquare(int n) { int root = (int) Math.sqrt(n); return root * root == n; } private int dfs(int[] nums, int pos, Map counter) { if (pos == nums.length) return 1; int count = 0; for (int key : counter.keySet()) { if (counter.get(key) != 0 && (pos == 0 || isSquare(nums[pos - 1] + key))) { counter.put(key, counter.get(key) - 1); nums[pos] = key; count += dfs(nums, pos + 1, counter); counter.put(key, counter.get(key) + 1); } } return count; } }
